revision.comment: Auto-generated page using script written by Immanuelle, either as a placeholder redirect or to make bots recognize the page as made by Immanuelle
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Plain text/doc]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Auto-generated page using script written by Immanuelle, either as a placeholder redirect or to make bots recognize the page as made by Immanuelle
revision.text: [[Category:Pages with blank templates]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] </noinclude>

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
1 revision imported: import overwrite
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23525408989|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{High-use}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Template|{{Lua|Module:Plain text}}}}{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Module|{{Lua|Module:Yesno}}}} {{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Module|Implements {{Tl|Plain text}}.{{sp}}}}Developed for producing short descriptions from text that may have markup, or other stuff that needs removing from short descriptions. == Usage == ;Code: :'''[[Foo|hah]]'''e is '''''[[gah]]'''''<nowiki>?</nowiki> → :'''[[Foo|hah]]'''e is '''''[[gah]]'''''? ; Using {{lc:{{NAMESPACE}}}}: :{{{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Template|Plain text|#invoke:Plain text{{!}}main}}|1='''[[Foo|hah]]'''e is '''''[[gah]]'''''<nowiki>?</nowiki>}} → :{{Plain text|1='''[[Foo|hah]]'''e is '''''[[gah]]'''''?}} ==See also== {{Navbox wikitext-handling templates}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[pt:Predefinição:Texto simples/doc]] [[vi:Bản mẫu:Plain text/doc]] [[Category:Modules that manipulate strings]] [[Category:Wikitext processing templates]] [[Category:WikiProject Short descriptions]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
Bot: consolidate 2 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24957526818|time triggered pipeline]]
